sections.paragraph:
Original: קבל

Transliteration: qôbel

Phonetic: ko'-bel

BDB Definition:

  1. something in front, attacking engine, something before
    1. before
    2. siege-engine, battering-ram

Origin: from H6901 in the sense of confronting (as standing opposite in order to receive)

TWOT entry: 1980a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
